name: axion-crm-pro-poc-05-dedup-performance
description: POC #5 — Validation perf anti-doublon Niveau 3 à 10M rows

scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d && echo Waiting Postgres ready... && pwsh -Command "Start-Sleep 8"
scripts.start: pnpm run docker:up && pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm run db:seed && pnpm run benchmark
